title: anaphalis sinica var. alata
intro: Anaphalis sinica var. alata, also known as the Himalayan pearly everlasting or alpine everlasting, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Anaphalis sinica var. alata include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the flowers and leaves for use in teas, infusions, and tinctures.
